name: Richmond Vanadium Technology Limited
description: Richmond Vanadium Technology is an Australian minerals development company focused on advancing the Richmond – Julia Creek Vanadium Project in Queensland. The company aims to unlock the potential of its world-class vanadium deposit to support the global energy transition, positioning itself as a trusted, long-term supplier of high-quality vanadium. Listed on the Australian Securities Exchange, the company is committed to sustainable development and has achieved Coordinated Project status for its flagship asset, which is currently undergoing a Bankable Feasibility Study to demonstrate its technical and financial viability for future production.
